scripts.dev:all:lite: concurrently -n vendor,admin -c green,yellow "pnpm run dev:vendor:lite" "pnpm run dev:admin:lite"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n vendor,admin -c green,yellow "pnpm run dev:vendor" "pnpm run dev:admin"
scripts.dev:all:with-mobile: concurrently -n vendor,admin,mobile -c green,yellow,magenta "pnpm run dev:vendor" "pnpm run dev:admin" "pnpm run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:all:with-mobile:lite: concurrently -n vendor,admin,mobile -c green,yellow,magenta "pnpm run dev:vendor:lite" "pnpm run dev:admin:lite" "pnpm run dev:mobile:lite"
